name: Talon Side-by-Side Compare
description: Talon 3D mesh on the LEFT, Talon sprite atlas on the RIGHT. Sprite lights are disabled so hull silhouette/content can be compared without giant engine/nav glows photobombing the evidence. Caveat on cell-selection parallax: because the objects are physically offset, each sees the camera from a slightly different azimuth. Fly farther out to reduce that error; for exact 80-cell comparison use tools/tour_ship_sprite_atlas.sh instead.
